presets.label: Instagram Reels (organic)
presets.frameRate: 30fps or 60fps timeline, matched to the highest-motion source clip in the edit
presets.audio: AAC, 48kHz, -14 LUFS integrated loudness, music ducked at least 8dB under voice-over
presets.notes: Export with the safe-zone guide track hidden. Confirm no red-zone overlap on final render.

presets.label: Paid Instagram Reel ads
presets.audio: AAC, 48kHz, -14 LUFS integrated loudness, music ducked at least 8dB under voice-over
presets.notes: Same technical spec as organic Reels — the differentiators are timing/structure rules above, not resolution or codec.

presets.label: Website video

variants.resolution: 1080x1920 or 16:9 crop for hero placements, per page context
variants.bitrateTarget: compressed, target file size under 6MB for a 30s clip
variants.audio: muted track, autoplay-friendly (no audio track required, or silent AAC track)

variants.bitrateTarget: compressed, target file size under 4MB for a 30s clip

presets.notes: Provide both MP4 and WebM for browser compatibility. Ending frame should be visually calm (e.g. the CTA end card) so a loop restart isn't jarring.
